data.title: RED: Tests for sprint primary ticket model
data.description:
Create tests/scripts/test-sprint-primary-ticket-model.sh with structural and routing constraint tests for the sprint SKILL.md primary ticket model (SC1, SC4, SC5).

## Test Cases (15+)

### Terminology (negative constraints)
- test_no_epic_selection_header: No "## Phase 1: Initialization & Epic Selection" in SKILL.md
- test_no_post_epic_validation: No "## Phase 6: Post-Epic Validation"
- test_primary_ticket_in_phase1: "Primary Ticket Selection" present
- test_primary_ticket_in_phase6: "Primary Ticket" in Phase 6 header
- test_primary_ticket_id_var: "primary_ticket_id" or "primary-ticket-id" present

### Clarity Gate (behavioral structure tests)
- test_clarity_gate_section: "clarity gate" or "Clarity Gate" in Phase 1
- test_clarity_gate_layer1: "ticket-clarity-check" referenced in Phase 1
- test_clarity_gate_layer2: "scope_certainty" referenced as second gate
- test_clarity_gate_layer3: User escalation section with AskUserQuestion

### Routing (SC1 positive structure tests)
- test_bug_routing: Phase 1 contains "fix-bug" dispatch for bug-typed tickets
- test_non_epic_routing: Phase 1 contains complexity evaluation for non-epic types
- test_epic_routing_preserved: Preplanning gate still references "/dso:preplanning"

### User Escalation (SC4)
- test_escalation_fixbug_option: fix-bug option present in escalation section
- test_escalation_brainstorm_option: brainstorm option present
- test_escalation_proceed_option: proceed option present

### CHECKPOINT (SC5)
- test_checkpoint_semantic_format: "CHECKPOINT:" prefix pattern present

### Prompt Templates (SC5)
- test_prompt_primary_ticket_id: red-task-escalation.md and ci-failure-validation-state.md reference primary_ticket_id

## E2E Rationale
Sprint E2E testing (running /dso:sprint <story-id> end-to-end) is deferred to the skill eval framework (promptfoo). The eval tier verifies runtime routing behavior; unit-tier structural tests verify the SKILL.md contract.

## RED Marker
Add .test-index: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: tests/scripts/test-sprint-primary-ticket-model.sh [test_no_epic_selection_header]
(Fuzzy match won't catch this — SKILL.md doesn't substring-match test name.)
NOTE: Write .test-index AFTER Task 1 has written its entry (sequential writes).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-primary-ticket-model.sh
- [ ] At least 15 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sprint-primary-ticket-model.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 15)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry maps SKILL.md to test file
  Verify: grep -q "plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md.*test-sprint-primary-ticket-model" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
